name: mdy-daf-companion
description: Play the latest MDY Daf Yomi shiur during Claude Code sessions, with automatic pause/resume, saved progress, and local stats.

language.title: Shiur language
language.description: Preferred shiur language: english or hebrew.

format.title: Shiur format
format.description: Preferred shiur format: full or chazarah.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Timezone used for Daf Yomi and stats, for example America/Chicago.

auto_open_player.title: Auto-open player
auto_open_player.description: Whether the plugin should open the local player automatically: true or false.

youtube_api_key.title: YouTube API key
youtube_api_key.description: Optional YouTube Data API key for stronger video metadata lookup.
